TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Bunun, story: bnNr-pear_Hanaivaz
TEXT.citation: Sung, L. M., Lily, I., Hsieh, F., & Lin, Z. (2008). Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics, 6(2.).
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @article{sung2008developing,title={Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages.},author={Sung, Li-May and Lily, I and Hsieh, Fuhui and Lin, Zhemin and others},journal={Taiwan Journal of Linguistics},volume={6},number={2},year={2008}}

S.FORM: mihumisang.
S.PHON: mix~χumisaŋ.
S.FORM: mihumisang.
S.PHON: mix~χumisaŋ.
S.TRANSL: 你好
Hello

S.FORM: natahu saikin mas pali'uni itu habasang mailantangus tu palihabasan.
S.PHON: natax~χu saikin mas pal~ɬiʔuni itu x~χabasaŋ mail~ɬantaŋus tu pal~ɬix~χabasan.
S.FORM: natahu saikin mas pali'uni itu habasang mailantangus tu palihabasan.
S.PHON: natax~χu saikin mas pal~ɬiʔuni itu x~χabasaŋ mail~ɬantaŋus tu pal~ɬix~χabasan.
S.TRANSL: 我要說以前祖先的傳說故事.
I am going to narrate, about the previous ancestral story.

S.FORM: aiza tu tacini maza sia madaingaz supahan mas huma tu.
S.PHON: aiða tu taʨini maða ɕia madaiŋað supax~χan mas x~χuma tu.
S.FORM: aiza tu tacini maza sia madaingaz supahan mas huma tu.
S.PHON: aiða tu taʨini maða ɕia madaiŋað supax~χan mas x~χuma tu.
S.TRANSL: 有一位老人種了很多的農作物.
There is an old man, he planted various species of plants in many fields

S.FORM: isaicia sinsusuaza maza isian huma mastaan tu kanaskalun saicia hai sia salvi.
S.PHON: isaiʨia ɕinsusuaða maða iɕian x~χuma mastaan tu kanaskal~ɬun saiʨia x~χai ɕia sal~ɬvi.
S.FORM: isaicia sinsusuaza maza isian huma mastaan tu kanaskalun saicia hai sia salvi.
S.PHON: isaiʨia ɕinsusuaða maða iɕian x~χuma mastaan tu kanaskal~ɬun saiʨia x~χai ɕia sal~ɬvi.
S.TRANSL: 他的農作物中,他最滿意的是梨子.
What he planted the most satisfying one is the pear

W.TRANSL: 致使<重疊>種植=遠距.主格

S.FORM: masuaz saia mas salvi at masmuav tu mavis'ik a isaicia maza sinsuaz.
S.PHON: masuað saia mas sal~ɬvi at masmuav tu mavisʔik a isaiʨia maða ɕinsuað.
S.FORM: masuaz saia mas salvi at masmuav tu mavis'ik a isaicia maza sinsuaz.
S.PHON: masuað saia mas sal~ɬvi at masmuav tu mavisʔik a isaiʨia maða ɕinsuað.
S.TRANSL: 他所種的梨子結實纍纍.
he planted pears, then the pears were fruitful

S.FORM: aiza tu tas tu hanian miliskin saia tu nakudii matapul mas isaicia tu sinsuaz tu salvicia.
S.PHON: aiða tu tas tu x~χanian mil~ɬiskin saia tu nakudii matapul~ɬ mas isaiʨia tu ɕinsuað tu sal~ɬviʨia.
S.FORM: aiza tu tas tu hanian miliskin saia tu nakudii matapul mas isaicia tu sinsuaz tu salvicia.
S.PHON: aiða tu tas tu x~χanian mil~ɬiskin saia tu nakudii matapul~ɬ mas isaiʨia tu ɕinsuað tu sal~ɬviʨia.
S.TRANSL: 有一天他想著要去採收他所種的梨子.
one day he thought of going to harvest the pears he planted

S.FORM: at madas saia tu tau tu kalala mas isaicia tu napadangian mas adii tu salvicia.
S.PHON: at madas saia tu tau tu kal~ɬal~ɬa mas isaiʨia tu napadaŋian mas adii tu sal~ɬviʨia.
S.FORM: at madas saia tu tau tu kalala mas isaicia tu napadangian mas adii tu salvicia.
S.PHON: at madas saia tu tau tu kal~ɬal~ɬa mas isaiʨia tu napadaŋian mas adii tu sal~ɬviʨia.
S.TRANSL: 然後,他帶著他的三個籃子要裝那裡的梨子.
then, he carried his three baskets to load the pears

S.FORM: tuza tu macingmut saia mudaan kusia saicia tu huma nasiza mas salvi.
S.PHON: tuða tu maʨiŋmut saia mudaan kuɕia saiʨia tu x~χuma naɕiða mas sal~ɬvi.
S.FORM: tuza tu macingmut saia mudaan kusia saicia tu huma nasiza mas salvi.
S.PHON: tuða tu maʨiŋmut saia mudaan kuɕia saiʨia tu x~χuma naɕiða mas sal~ɬvi.
S.TRANSL: 他果然一大早出發去他的田裡要採梨子.
as expected, he went to his field in early morning to harvest the pears

S.FORM: at manaskal saia matatapul macingmut maisi'um'um matatapul aiz(a)in dusa tu kalala matmuzin isaicia sintapul.
S.PHON: at manaskal~ɬ saia matatapul~ɬ maʨiŋmut maiɕiʔumʔum matatapul~ɬ aið(a)in dusa tu kal~ɬal~ɬa matmuðin isaiʨia ɕintapul~ɬ.
S.FORM: at manaskal saia matatapul macingmut maisi'um'um matatapul aiz(a)in dusa tu kalala matmuzin isaicia sintapul.
S.PHON: at manaskal~ɬ saia matatapul~ɬ maʨiŋmut maiɕiʔumʔum matatapul~ɬ aið(a)in dusa tu kal~ɬal~ɬa matmuðin isaiʨia ɕintapul~ɬ.
S.TRANSL: 他高興地一直採收,從一大早一直採收了兩籃滿滿了 .
He enthusiastically picking the pears from the early morning he gathered for two baskets the two baskets were full

S.FORM: ungat miliskin saia tu aizaang tu tasa ukaanang at napitmuzun amin saicia matapula mazasia tu isaicia salvi aupa masmuav tu mavis'ik a isaicia mazasia sinsuaz mazasia salvi.
S.PHON: uŋat mil~ɬiskin saia tu aiðaaŋ tu tasa ukaanaŋ at napitmuðun amin saiʨia matapul~ɬa maðaɕia tu isaiʨia sal~ɬvi aupa masmuav tu mavisʔik a isaiʨia maðaɕia ɕinsuað maðaɕia sal~ɬvi.
S.FORM: ungat miliskin saia tu aizaang tu tasa ukaanang at napitmuzun amin saicia matapula mazasia tu isaicia salvi aupa masmuav tu mavis'ik a isaicia mazasia sinsuaz mazasia salvi.
S.PHON: uŋat mil~ɬiskin saia tu aiðaaŋ tu tasa ukaanaŋ at napitmuðun amin saiʨia matapul~ɬa maðaɕia tu isaiʨia sal~ɬvi aupa masmuav tu mavisʔik a isaiʨia maðaɕia ɕinsuað maðaɕia sal~ɬvi.
S.TRANSL: 然後他想到還有一個還沒有,要把他採收的梨子裝滿,因為他所種的梨子太豐收了.
he thought there was still one basket hadn't filled yet it was better to also load it because the pears he planted was extremely fruitful

S.FORM: at miliskin saia tu muhnaang kudadaza matapul mas isaicia tu salvicia.
S.PHON: at mil~ɬiskin saia tu mux~χnaaŋ kudadaða matapul~ɬ mas isaiʨia tu sal~ɬviʨia.
S.FORM: at miliskin saia tu muhnaang kudadaza matapul mas isaicia tu salvicia.
S.PHON: at mil~ɬiskin saia tu mux~χnaaŋ kudadaða matapul~ɬ mas isaiʨia tu sal~ɬviʨia.
S.TRANSL: 他想著再一次上去採他的梨子.
he thought to climb up again to pick the pears

S.FORM: idadaza saia sia lukis manaskal matatapul hai.
S.PHON: idadaða saia ɕia l~ɬukis manaskal~ɬ matatapul~ɬ x~χai.
S.FORM: idadaza saia sia lukis manaskal matatapul hai.
S.PHON: idadaða saia ɕia l~ɬukis manaskal~ɬ matatapul~ɬ x~χai.
S.TRANSL: 他在樹上很開心地一直採收.
he was in the tree excitedly picking off the pears

S.FORM: aiza tu tacini maza uvaaz minsuma tuntanpu anghaib sia isaicia tu huma tu cinapul tu salvicia.
S.PHON: aiða tu taʨini maða uvaað minsuma tuntanpu aŋx~χaib ɕia isaiʨia tu x~χuma tu ʨinapul~ɬ tu sal~ɬviʨia.
S.FORM: aiza tu tacini maza uvaaz minsuma tuntanpu anghaib sia isaicia tu huma tu cinapul tu salvicia.
S.PHON: aiða tu taʨini maða uvaað minsuma tuntanpu aŋx~χaib ɕia isaiʨia tu x~χuma tu ʨinapul~ɬ tu sal~ɬviʨia.
S.TRANSL: 有一個孩子騎腳踏車經過他採收梨子的農地.
there was a kid coming up he rode a bicycle passing through the old man's baskets.

S.FORM: sadu maza uvaaza tu ai uka maza sia madaingaza sia matatapula.
S.PHON: sadu maða uvaaða tu ai uka maða ɕia madaiŋaða ɕia matatapul~ɬa.
S.FORM: sadu maza uvaaza tu ai uka maza sia madaingaza sia matatapula.
S.PHON: sadu maða uvaaða tu ai uka maða ɕia madaiŋaða ɕia matatapul~ɬa.
S.TRANSL: 那個孩子沒有看到那個採梨子的老人.
he didn't see that old man

W.TRANSL: 主焦-重疊-採收=遠距.主格

S.FORM: ung haitu mavia tu aiza matmuz sia nastu sia tanngadah lukistan a maza dusa tu kalala matmuzin a tin apul a maza sia tu.
S.PHON: uŋ x~χaitu mavia tu aiða matmuð ɕia nastu ɕia tanŋadax~χ l~ɬukistan a maða dusa tu kal~ɬal~ɬa matmuðin a tin apul~ɬ a maða ɕia tu.
S.FORM: ung haitu mavia tu aiza matmuz sia nastu sia tanngadah lukistan a maza dusa tu kalala matmuzin a tin apul a maza sia tu.
S.PHON: uŋ x~χaitu mavia tu aiða matmuð ɕia nastu ɕia tanŋadax~χ l~ɬukistan a maða dusa tu kal~ɬal~ɬa matmuðin a tin apul~ɬ a maða ɕia tu.
S.TRANSL: 為什麼樹下有兩個裝滿採下的梨子的籃子呢?
why there was two full under this tree two baskets full of pears

S.FORM: at sadu uvaaza tu uat uka bunun sadu at miliskin saia tu natanghaiu tu dusa ung haitu sadu saia tu mais dusa hai kauman.
S.PHON: at sadu uvaaða tu uat uka bunun sadu at mil~ɬiskin saia tu nataŋx~χaiu tu dusa uŋ x~χaitu sadu saia tu mais dusa x~χai kauman.
S.FORM: at sadu uvaaza tu uat uka bunun sadu at miliskin saia tu natanghaiu tu dusa ung haitu sadu saia tu mais dusa hai kauman.
S.PHON: at sadu uvaaða tu uat uka bunun sadu at mil~ɬiskin saia tu nataŋx~χaiu tu dusa uŋ x~χaitu sadu saia tu mais dusa x~χai kauman.
S.TRANSL: 小孩看沒有人在看,他想要偷兩個,可是兩個太少.

TRANSL.notes: the kid looked around he found no one (around) he wanted to steal two pears but two pears were too few

S.TRANSL: the kid looked around he found no one he wanted to steal two pears but two pears were too few

S.FORM: miliskin saia tu minsuuzta tanghaiu tu tas tu kalala.
S.PHON: mil~ɬiskin saia tu minsuuðta taŋx~χaiu tu tas tu kal~ɬal~ɬa.
S.FORM: miliskin saia tu minsuuzta tanghaiu tu tas tu kalala.
S.PHON: mil~ɬiskin saia tu minsuuðta taŋx~χaiu tu tas tu kal~ɬal~ɬa.
S.TRANSL: 他想著:「我們乾脆偷走一籃好了.」
he thought it was better to steal a full basket

S.FORM: at tuza tu masivit saia hai ukaang usaduan saicia a manaskal saia siza mas tas tu kalalacia.
S.PHON: at tuða tu maɕivit saia x~χai ukaaŋ usaduan saiʨia a manaskal~ɬ saia ɕiða mas tas tu kal~ɬal~ɬaʨia.
S.FORM: at tuza tu masivit saia hai ukaang usaduan saicia a manaskal saia siza mas tas tu kalalacia.
S.PHON: at tuða tu maɕivit saia x~χai ukaaŋ usaduan saiʨia a manaskal~ɬ saia ɕiða mas tas tu kal~ɬal~ɬaʨia.
S.TRANSL: 然後他仔細觀察,老人沒有看到他,他開心地拿了一籃.

S.FORM: antabanun saicia tas tu kalala pudazaun sia isaicia tu at patuntanpuun saicia mudaan.
S.PHON: antabanun saiʨia tas tu kal~ɬal~ɬa pudaðaun ɕia isaiʨia tu at patuntanpuun saiʨia mudaan.
S.FORM: antabanun saicia tas tu kalala pudazaun sia isaicia tu at patuntanpuun saicia mudaan.
S.PHON: antabanun saiʨia tas tu kal~ɬal~ɬa pudaðaun ɕia isaiʨia tu at patuntanpuun saiʨia mudaan.
S.TRANSL: 他把這一籃拿走,放上他的腳踏車走了.
stole that basket carried it off

S.FORM: miliskin saia tu ua madasik tu tas tu kalalacia salvitan kulumah.
S.PHON: mil~ɬiskin saia tu ua madaɕik tu tas tu kal~ɬal~ɬaʨia sal~ɬvitan kul~ɬumax~χ.
S.FORM: miliskin saia tu ua madasik tu tas tu kalalacia salvitan kulumah.
S.PHON: mil~ɬiskin saia tu ua madaɕik tu tas tu kal~ɬal~ɬaʨia sal~ɬvitan kul~ɬumax~χ.
S.TRANSL: 他想著:「哇!我帶了一籃梨子回家.」
he thought wow I brought back home a basket of pears

S.FORM: manaskal saia antaban tanghaiu mas tas tu kalala tu salvicia.
S.PHON: manaskal~ɬ saia antaban taŋx~χaiu mas tas tu kal~ɬal~ɬa tu sal~ɬviʨia.
S.FORM: manaskal saia antaban tanghaiu mas tas tu kalala tu salvicia.
S.PHON: manaskal~ɬ saia antaban taŋx~χaiu mas tas tu kal~ɬal~ɬa tu sal~ɬviʨia.
S.TRANSL: 他很興奮地偷拿走一籃梨子.
he was so excited to bring the basket of pears that he had stolen

S.FORM: iskamishang sia daan hai mapalanduu saia mas manauaz tu binanauaz.
S.PHON: iskamisx~χaŋ ɕia daan x~χai mapal~ɬanduu saia mas manauað tu binanauað.
S.FORM: iskamishang sia daan hai mapalanduu saia mas manauaz tu binanauaz.
S.PHON: iskamisx~χaŋ ɕia daan x~χai mapal~ɬanduu saia mas manauað tu binanauað.
S.TRANSL: 半路上,他遇見了漂亮的小姐.
he met a pretty girl

S.FORM: miliskin sadu saia tu ai manauaz a binanauaza palanduanan sakakiiv saia sadu hai mas binanauazcia nii tu haiap tu maza maltanangaus aiza batudaingaz.
S.PHON: mil~ɬiskin sadu saia tu ai manauað a binanauaða pal~ɬanduanan sakakiiv saia sadu x~χai mas binanauaðʨia nii tu x~χaiap tu maða mal~ɬtanaŋaus aiða batudaiŋað.
S.FORM: miliskin sadu saia tu ai manauaz a binanauaza palanduanan sakakiiv saia sadu hai mas binanauazcia nii tu haiap tu maza maltanangaus aiza batudaingaz.
S.PHON: mil~ɬiskin sadu saia tu ai manauað a binanauaða pal~ɬanduanan sakakiiv saia sadu x~χai mas binanauaðʨia nii tu x~χaiap tu maða mal~ɬtanaŋaus aiða batudaiŋað.
S.TRANSL: 他看到這個遇到的小姐很漂亮,他回頭看那個小姐,不知道前面有個大石頭.
he found that the girl was so beautiful when he looked back at that girl there was a big stone in front of him

S.FORM: paptuh isaicia maza tanpu a tauntauna sia batucia pantunghaz saia.
S.PHON: paptux~χ isaiʨia maða tanpu a tauntauna ɕia batuʨia pantuŋx~χað saia.
S.FORM: paptuh isaicia maza tanpu a tauntauna sia batucia pantunghaz saia.
S.PHON: paptux~χ isaiʨia maða tanpu a tauntauna ɕia batuʨia pantuŋx~χað saia.
S.TRANSL: 他的腳踏車的輪子撞到那個石頭倒了.
his bicycle's wheel hit the stone he fell off his bicycle

S.FORM: musasu tu cin'uman isaicia tamuung.
S.PHON: musasu tu ʨinʔuman isaiʨia tamuuŋ.
S.FORM: musasu tu cin'uman isaicia tamuung.
S.PHON: musasu tu ʨinʔuman isaiʨia tamuuŋ.
S.TRANSL: 他的帽子同時也落掉了.
meanwhile his hat also fell off

S.FORM: masa pantunghaz saia hai mututu isaicia maza sia salvia tas tu kalalaa.
S.PHON: masa pantuŋx~χað saia x~χai mututu isaiʨia maða ɕia sal~ɬvia tas tu kal~ɬal~ɬaa.
S.FORM: masa pantunghaz saia hai mututu isaicia maza sia salvia tas tu kalalaa.
S.PHON: masa pantuŋx~χað saia x~χai mututu isaiʨia maða ɕia sal~ɬvia tas tu kal~ɬal~ɬaa.
S.TRANSL: 當他摔倒的時候,一籃的梨子也都撒出來了.
when he fell off the bicycle pears in the basket also spilled out

S.FORM: isian saia daancia is'anuhu sadu isaicia tu malung tu milu'lu pishaidang.
S.PHON: iɕian saia daanʨia isʔanux~χu sadu isaiʨia tu mal~ɬuŋ tu mil~ɬuʔl~ɬu pisx~χaidaŋ.
S.FORM: isian saia daancia is'anuhu sadu isaicia tu malung tu milu'lu pishaidang.
S.PHON: iɕian saia daanʨia isʔanux~χu sadu isaiʨia tu mal~ɬuŋ tu mil~ɬuʔl~ɬu pisx~χaidaŋ.
S.TRANSL: 他在路上蹲下來看他受傷流血的膝蓋.

TRANSL.notes: he was on the road sitting down to see his bleeding knee bleeding (knee)

S.TRANSL: he was on the road sitting down to see his bleeding knee bleeding

S.FORM: mal'angkuzu saia masasamsam isaicia tu malung hai.
S.PHON: mal~ɬʔaŋkuðu saia masasamsam isaiʨia tu mal~ɬuŋ x~χai.
S.FORM: mal'angkuzu saia masasamsam isaicia tu malung hai.
S.PHON: mal~ɬʔaŋkuðu saia masasamsam isaiʨia tu mal~ɬuŋ x~χai.
S.TRANSL: 他蹲著,一直揉他的膝蓋.
he squatted down and keep rubbing his knee

S.FORM: aiza andingalan sia daan tatau uvaaz sadu naicia sadu saicia tu.
S.PHON: aiða andiŋal~ɬan ɕia daan tatau uvaað sadu naiʨia sadu saiʨia tu.
S.FORM: aiza andingalan sia daan tatau uvaaz sadu naicia sadu saicia tu.
S.PHON: aiða andiŋal~ɬan ɕia daan tatau uvaað sadu naiʨia sadu saiʨia tu.
S.TRANSL: 在路的旁邊有三位小孩子看到他跌倒.
there were three kids beside the road they saw he fell down

S.FORM: at masial naicia is'aang miliskin tu indangazav adii uvaaza mindia ii masmuav tu supahdaingaza tas tu kalala mututuan.
S.PHON: at maɕial~ɬ naiʨia isʔaaŋ mil~ɬiskin tu indaŋaðav adii uvaaða mindia ii masmuav tu supax~χdaiŋaða tas tu kal~ɬal~ɬa mututuan.
S.FORM: at masial naicia is'aang miliskin tu indangazav adii uvaaza mindia ii masmuav tu supahdaingaza tas tu kalala mututuan.
S.PHON: at maɕial~ɬ naiʨia isʔaaŋ mil~ɬiskin tu indaŋaðav adii uvaaða mindia ii masmuav tu supax~χdaiŋaða tas tu kal~ɬal~ɬa mututuan.
S.TRANSL: 他們心地善良,想著說;「讓我們來幫那個孩子撿起來!」因為一籃全掉出來,太多了.
they thought to help that kid picking up his pears but there were too many pears cause all of them fell off the road

S.FORM: tuza tu maza tatau uvaaza hai mindangaz kudii sia uvaazcia mindia mas inaicia minututu tu salvicia.
S.PHON: tuða tu maða tatau uvaaða x~χai mindaŋað kudii ɕia uvaaðʨia mindia mas inaiʨia minututu tu sal~ɬviʨia.
S.FORM: tuza tu maza tatau uvaaza hai mindangaz kudii sia uvaazcia mindia mas inaicia minututu tu salvicia.
S.PHON: tuða tu maða tatau uvaaða x~χai mindaŋað kudii ɕia uvaaðʨia mindia mas inaiʨia minututu tu sal~ɬviʨia.
S.TRANSL: 果然那三個孩子去孩子那邊幫忙撿他掉出來的梨子.
but those three kids really helped that kid they helped him picked up the scattered pears

S.FORM: indangazan amin uvaazcia ansahan mapundaza sia tanpucia sidangkazun uvaaza.
S.PHON: indaŋaðan amin uvaaðʨia ansax~χan mapundaða ɕia tanpuʨia ɕidaŋkaðun uvaaða.
S.FORM: indangazan amin uvaazcia ansahan mapundaza sia tanpucia sidangkazun uvaaza.
S.PHON: indaŋaðan amin uvaaðʨia ansax~χan mapundaða ɕia tanpuʨia ɕidaŋkaðun uvaaða.
S.TRANSL: 孩子也幫忙搬到他的腳踏車上,把孩子扶起來.
gathered them in the basket and put it back on the bicycle they also help lift him up

S.FORM: at maza tatau uvaaza hai tutuza tu masial mindangaz.
S.PHON: at maða tatau uvaaða x~χai tutuða tu maɕial~ɬ mindaŋað.
S.FORM: at maza tatau uvaaza hai tutuza tu masial mindangaz.
S.PHON: at maða tatau uvaaða x~χai tutuða tu maɕial~ɬ mindaŋað.
S.TRANSL: 那三個孩子真的很好心地幫助他,
those three kids were really nice helped him out

S.FORM: aiza tacini ansasuun naicia maza batua imishang sia daana paiptuhan mas isaicia tu tauntauna matakunav makunasia sila tu daan.
S.PHON: aiða taʨini ansasuun naiʨia maða batua imisx~χaŋ ɕia daana paiptux~χan mas isaiʨia tu tauntauna matakunav makunaɕia ɕil~ɬa tu daan.
S.FORM: aiza tacini ansasuun naicia maza batua imishang sia daana paiptuhan mas isaicia tu tauntauna matakunav makunasia sila tu daan.
S.PHON: aiða taʨini ansasuun naiʨia maða batua imisx~χaŋ ɕia daana paiptux~χan mas isaiʨia tu tauntauna matakunav makunaɕia ɕil~ɬa tu daan.
S.TRANSL: 有一個孩子順便把路中間那顆車輪撞到的石頭丟在路邊.
one of them at the same time throw the stone away throw it away across the street

S.FORM: aupa miliskin naia tu mais aizaang a duma anghaip hai namaupacia tu mucingkul.
S.PHON: aupa mil~ɬiskin naia tu mais aiðaaŋ a duma aŋx~χaip x~χai namaupaʨia tu muʨiŋkul~ɬ.
S.FORM: aupa miliskin naia tu mais aizaang a duma anghaip hai namaupacia tu mucingkul.
S.PHON: aupa mil~ɬiskin naia tu mais aiðaaŋ a duma aŋx~χaip x~χai namaupaʨia tu muʨiŋkul~ɬ.
S.TRANSL: 因為他們想萬一還有別人經過也會像那樣的跌倒.

TRANSL.notes: they thought if there were other people passed through (this road) they might fall off like him

S.TRANSL: they thought if there were other people passed through they might fall off like him

S.FORM: tuza tu masial naia sia tatau uvaaza masial naicia is'aang at.
S.PHON: tuða tu maɕial~ɬ naia ɕia tatau uvaaða maɕial~ɬ naiʨia isʔaaŋ at.
S.FORM: tuza tu masial naia sia tatau uvaaza masial naicia is'aang at.
S.PHON: tuða tu maɕial~ɬ naia ɕia tatau uvaaða maɕial~ɬ naiʨia isʔaaŋ at.
S.TRANSL: 他們真的是好,那三個孩子的心地真好.
those three kids were really nice, they were good persons indeed

S.FORM: maupacia naia mudaan mapacinpalavaaz hai manaskal amin a taininghaiu uvaaza macingna ma'unding mudaan.
S.PHON: maupaʨia naia mudaan mapaʨinpal~ɬavaað x~χai manaskal~ɬ amin a tainiŋx~χaiu uvaaða maʨiŋna maʔundiŋ mudaan.
S.FORM: maupacia naia mudaan mapacinpalavaaz hai manaskal amin a taininghaiu uvaaza macingna ma'unding mudaan.
S.PHON: maupaʨia naia mudaan mapaʨinpal~ɬavaað x~χai manaskal~ɬ amin a tainiŋx~χaiu uvaaða maʨiŋna maʔundiŋ mudaan.
S.TRANSL: 他們就這樣分別了,那個偷過東西的孩子也很開心,再次騎車走了.
and so they walked separately the one who stole the pears was also happy and left

S.FORM: taunamishang hai sadu adii tatau uvaaza tu ai asia daan itu uvaaza tamuung kaungaan.
S.PHON: taunamisx~χaŋ x~χai sadu adii tatau uvaaða tu ai aɕia daan itu uvaaða tamuuŋ kauŋaan.
S.FORM: taunamishang hai sadu adii tatau uvaaza tu ai asia daan itu uvaaza tamuung kaungaan.
S.PHON: taunamisx~χaŋ x~χai sadu adii tatau uvaaða tu ai aɕia daan itu uvaaða tamuuŋ kauŋaan.
S.TRANSL: 走到一半,那三個孩子看到:「哇!他的帽子忘在路上了.」
in the half way those three kids yelled out "hey" they saw he forgot his hat, it was left on the road

S.FORM: pis'ulukan saicia sakakiiv hai askadaizadii saduanang at lalaun naicia tu pis'ulukan saicia mala'la tu iu ai saduava.
S.PHON: pisʔul~ɬukan saiʨia sakakiiv x~χai askadaiðadii saduanaŋ at l~ɬal~ɬaun naiʨia tu pisʔul~ɬukan saiʨia mal~ɬaʔl~ɬa tu iu ai saduava.
S.FORM: pis'ulukan saicia sakakiiv hai askadaizadii saduanang at lalaun naicia tu pis'ulukan saicia mala'la tu iu ai saduava.
S.PHON: pisʔul~ɬukan saiʨia sakakiiv x~χai askadaiðadii saduanaŋ at l~ɬal~ɬaun naiʨia tu pisʔul~ɬukan saiʨia mal~ɬaʔl~ɬa tu iu ai saduava.
S.TRANSL: 他回頭看,還看到他在那裡,他們吹口哨呼叫他:「呦!看這裡!」

TRANSL.notes: he (one of the three kids) looked back and whistled they still could see him they yelled at the kid and whistled to him "please see"

S.TRANSL: he looked back and whistled they still could see him they yelled at the kid and whistled to him "please see"

W.TRANSL: 可見.遠距-途中-那裡-那裡

S.FORM: at islunghu adii uvaaza tanghaiu sakakiiv hai tupa saia tu adii isu tamuung.
S.PHON: at isl~ɬuŋx~χu adii uvaaða taŋx~χaiu sakakiiv x~χai tupa saia tu adii isu tamuuŋ.
S.FORM: at islunghu adii uvaaza tanghaiu sakakiiv hai tupa saia tu adii isu tamuung.
S.PHON: at isl~ɬuŋx~χu adii uvaaða taŋx~χaiu sakakiiv x~χai tupa saia tu adii isu tamuuŋ.
S.TRANSL: 然後,那個偷東西的孩子停下來回頭看,他說「你的帽子在那裡.」
the kid stopped and peeped out those three kids said: "here is your hat"

S.FORM: at suhaisun naicia masatu masaiv tamuung.
S.PHON: at sux~χaisun naiʨia masatu masaiv tamuuŋ.
S.FORM: at suhaisun naicia masatu masaiv tamuung.
S.PHON: at sux~χaisun naiʨia masatu masaiv tamuuŋ.
S.TRANSL: 然後他們把帽子送還給他.
they went back again to hand over his hat

S.FORM: at antalaun sia taininghaiu uvaazcia tamuung hai maza taininghaiu hai dangian amin is'aang miliskin tu at uninang at masaiv saicia tu tau mas salvicia mas uvaazcia.
S.PHON: at antal~ɬaun ɕia tainiŋx~χaiu uvaaðʨia tamuuŋ x~χai maða tainiŋx~χaiu x~χai daŋian amin isʔaaŋ mil~ɬiskin tu at uninaŋ at masaiv saiʨia tu tau mas sal~ɬviʨia mas uvaaðʨia.
S.FORM: at antalaun sia taininghaiu uvaazcia tamuung hai maza taininghaiu hai dangian amin is'aang miliskin tu at uninang at masaiv saicia tu tau mas salvicia mas uvaazcia.
S.PHON: at antal~ɬaun ɕia tainiŋx~χaiu uvaaðʨia tamuuŋ x~χai maða tainiŋx~χaiu x~χai daŋian amin isʔaaŋ mil~ɬiskin tu at uninaŋ at masaiv saiʨia tu tau mas sal~ɬviʨia mas uvaaðʨia.
S.TRANSL: 那個偷東西的孩子拿到帽子後,心裡也覺得感激,他就給那孩子三個梨子.
after getting the hat, that kid the kid who stole the pears he then felt grateful and gave them three pears

S.FORM: manaskal naia maupacia mapacinpalavaaz.
S.PHON: manaskal~ɬ naia maupaʨia mapaʨinpal~ɬavaað.
S.FORM: manaskal naia maupacia mapacinpalavaaz.
S.PHON: manaskal~ɬ naia maupaʨia mapaʨinpal~ɬavaað.
S.TRANSL: 他們很高興,就這樣分開了.
and so they separated with joy

S.FORM: at maza sia tatau uvaaza hai maisidii naia mudaan tundadaan mapahainanhainan anghaib sia adii madaingaza maza sia tu u ai ungtu matatapul mas salvia.
S.PHON: at maða ɕia tatau uvaaða x~χai maiɕidii naia mudaan tundadaan mapax~χainanx~χainan aŋx~χaib ɕia adii madaiŋaða maða ɕia tu u ai uŋtu matatapul~ɬ mas sal~ɬvia.
S.FORM: at maza sia tatau uvaaza hai maisidii naia mudaan tundadaan mapahainanhainan anghaib sia adii madaingaza maza sia tu u ai ungtu matatapul mas salvia.
S.PHON: at maða ɕia tatau uvaaða x~χai maiɕidii naia mudaan tundadaan mapax~χainanx~χainan aŋx~χaib ɕia adii madaiŋaða maða ɕia tu u ai uŋtu matatapul~ɬ mas sal~ɬvia.
S.TRANSL: 那三個小孩子從那邊沿路邊走邊玩,經過那採梨子的那個老人.
those three little kids they started walking from there

S.FORM: sadu naia tu a aiza dii salvia isia kalalaan haitu nii naia miliskin tu natanghaiu.
S.PHON: sadu naia tu a aiða dii sal~ɬvia iɕia kal~ɬal~ɬaan x~χaitu nii naia mil~ɬiskin tu nataŋx~χaiu.
S.FORM: sadu naia tu a aiza dii salvia isia kalalaan haitu nii naia miliskin tu natanghaiu.
S.PHON: sadu naia tu a aiða dii sal~ɬvia iɕia kal~ɬal~ɬaan x~χaitu nii naia mil~ɬiskin tu nataŋx~χaiu.
S.TRANSL: 他們看見籃子裡有梨子,但是沒想著要偷.
They saw there are pears in the basket. However, they did not want to steal any.

S.FORM: mututusbut naia anghaib.
S.PHON: mututusbut naia aŋx~χaib.
S.FORM: mututusbut naia anghaib.
S.PHON: mututusbut naia aŋx~χaib.
S.TRANSL: 他們就直接走過去.
They went through the way they were.

S.FORM: ungat munastuin a madaingaza tu namakankan isaicia tu sintapul tu ai ungtu salvi hai.
S.PHON: uŋat munastuin a madaiŋaða tu namakankan isaiʨia tu ɕintapul~ɬ tu ai uŋtu sal~ɬvi x~χai.
S.FORM: ungat munastuin a madaingaza tu namakankan isaicia tu sintapul tu ai ungtu salvi hai.
S.PHON: uŋat munastuin a madaiŋaða tu namakankan isaiʨia tu ɕintapul~ɬ tu ai uŋtu sal~ɬvi x~χai.
S.TRANSL: 那個老人下來要裝他所採的那個梨子
Then the old man went down to fill the pears he had picked.

S.FORM: cinhuza saia tu ai mavia tu ukin tasa ii niibin dusa hai matmuzin.
S.PHON: ʨinx~χuða saia tu ai mavia tu ukin tasa ii niibin dusa x~χai matmuðin.
S.FORM: cinhuza saia tu ai mavia tu ukin tasa ii niibin dusa hai matmuzin.
S.PHON: ʨinx~χuða saia tu ai mavia tu ukin tasa ii niibin dusa x~χai matmuðin.
S.TRANSL: 他嚇一跳,「欸?怎麼一個不見了?不是兩個滿了嗎?」
He was shocked: 'Why one of them is gone? Aren't there two filled up?'

S.FORM: ka ukin tasa kalala ukin amin a cinapul a maza sia tu nasia ai salvia.
S.PHON: ka ukin tasa kal~ɬal~ɬa ukin amin a ʨinapul~ɬ a maða ɕia tu naɕia ai sal~ɬvia.
S.FORM: ka ukin tasa kalala ukin amin a cinapul a maza sia tu nasia ai salvia.
S.PHON: ka ukin tasa kal~ɬal~ɬa ukin amin a ʨinapul~ɬ a maða ɕia tu naɕia ai sal~ɬvia.
S.TRANSL: 就一籃沒了,採過的梨子也不見了.
A basket was gone, and all picked pears were also gone.

S.FORM: at miliskin saia tu adii tu uvaaz tatautan anghaiba tanghaiu.
S.PHON: at mil~ɬiskin saia tu adii tu uvaað tatautan aŋx~χaiba taŋx~χaiu.
S.FORM: at miliskin saia tu adii tu uvaaz tatautan anghaiba tanghaiu.
S.PHON: at mil~ɬiskin saia tu adii tu uvaað tatautan aŋx~χaiba taŋx~χaiu.
S.TRANSL: 他在想會不會是這三個經過的孩子偷走了呢?
He wondered if there was any chance these three kids who just passed had stolen the basket?

S.FORM: haitu saduan saicia uvaaza hai kui uka andikusun a uka maza sia tu kalala saduan at.
S.PHON: x~χaitu saduan saiʨia uvaaða x~χai kui uka andikusun a uka maða ɕia tu kal~ɬal~ɬa saduan at.
S.FORM: haitu saduan saicia uvaaza hai kui uka andikusun a uka maza sia tu kalala saduan at.
S.PHON: x~χaitu saduan saiʨia uvaaða x~χai kui uka andikusun a uka maða ɕia tu kal~ɬal~ɬa saduan at.
S.TRANSL: 可是沒看到孩子拿著什麼,也沒看到籃子.
But he didn't see the kids hold any, neither did he see the basket.

S.FORM: kaz miliskin a madaingaz sadu sia uvaazcia tu tatau tu anghaib tu simabis tanghaiu mas inaak tu cinapul tu tas tu kalala tu salvitan.
S.PHON: kað mil~ɬiskin a madaiŋað sadu ɕia uvaaðʨia tu tatau tu aŋx~χaib tu ɕimabis taŋx~χaiu mas inaak tu ʨinapul~ɬ tu tas tu kal~ɬal~ɬa tu sal~ɬvitan.
S.FORM: kaz miliskin a madaingaz sadu sia uvaazcia tu tatau tu anghaib tu simabis tanghaiu mas inaak tu cinapul tu tas tu kalala tu salvitan.
S.PHON: kað mil~ɬiskin a madaiŋað sadu ɕia uvaaðʨia tu tatau tu aŋx~χaib tu ɕimabis taŋx~χaiu mas inaak tu ʨinapul~ɬ tu tas tu kal~ɬal~ɬa tu sal~ɬvitan.
S.TRANSL: 老人看著孩子想著說:「到底是誰偷了我採收的一籃的梨子呢?」
The old man looked at the kids and thought about who stole one of his harvest pears.

S.FORM: maupacia.
S.PHON: maupaʨia.
S.FORM: maupacia.
S.PHON: maupaʨia.
S.TRANSL: 就這樣
That's it.
